What the #$'! Do We Know (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,941,801Details
International Box Office $762,967
Worldwide Box Office $11,704,768
Further financial details...

Metrics

Legs:28.04 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$4,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.9 times production budget)
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,965,702

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 6th, 2004 (Limited) by Captured Light
International Releases: April 8th, 2005 (Wide), released as What The Bleep Do We Know?! (Australia)
Video Release: March 15th, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as What the Bleep Do We Know!?
MPA Rating: Not Rated
Running Time: 109 minutes
Franchise: What the Bleep
Plot point: Meaning of Life, Pseudoscience
Subgenre: Science Documentary
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Documentary
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
